name: Lentil & Bulgur Patty Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 cup scallions, finely chopped with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lentils, onion, garlic and water in a medium saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat.
4. Cover and cook for 20 to 25 minutes or until very tender.
5. Add the bulgur, remaining parsley, oil, salt, paprika, and pepper.
6. Stir to combine.
7. Cover and cook on low heat for 2 minutes.
8. Let cool to lukewarm in the covered pan.
9. When lukewarm, shape into patties.
10. Combine the remaining parsley and scallions on a dish.
11. Press both sides of the patties into it.
12. Serve the patties in pitas (cooled or chilled).
